title: Coruscant Fleet (disambiguation)
content:
The '''Coruscant Fleet''' may refer to several [[Fleet/Legends|fleets]] stationed over [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]:

*[[Coruscant Defense Fleet/Legends|Coruscant Defense Fleet]]: the Old Republic/Imperial Coruscant Defense Fleet
*[[New Republic First Fleet|Home Guard Fleet]]: the New Republic Coruscant Defense Fleet
*[[Coruscant Sector Fleet]]
*[[New Republic First Fleet|New Republic First Battle Group]]
*[[Coruscant Third Fleet]]
*[[First Coruscant Task Force]]
